pi_items.verified_value: Sample database representing a digital media store with artists, albums, tracks, invoices, and customers. Contains real iTunes library data plus fictitious customer details and auto-generated sales records.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Chinook database, a well-known public sample database representing a digital media store with 59 customers. All customer data contains invoice records with TotalSpend ranging from 30.00 to 49.62. The tier thresholds (Gold≥45.00, Silver≥38.00, Bronze≥30.00) and reward percentages (Gold=15%, Silver=10%, Bronze=5%) are specified in both metadata and task description. The database is sourced from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database and contains 5 Gold customers, 23 Silver customers, 31 Bronze customers, and 0 None-tier customers. All 59 customers qualify for loyalty rewards (minimum spend ≥30.00). JoinDate is calculated as the earliest invoice date for each customer.
